mapper.select: SELECT fm.*, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.avatar as sender_avatar FROM feedback_message fm LEFT JOIN user u ON fm.sender_id = u.id WHERE fm.feedback_id = #{feedbackId} ORDER BY fm.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback_message (feedback_id, sender_id, is_admin, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{feedbackId}, #{senderId}, #{isAdmin}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{createdAt})
